title: Object-Oriented Architecture and Capstone Delivery · Language Clinic: Oop Plugin Boundaries
summary: Deliver an extensible community-resource workflow with a domain core, replaceable boundaries, migrations, and operator evidence. Planned artifact: Add and verify the oop plugin boundaries increment in a production-shaped object-oriented capstone. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design plugin discovery, capability contracts, isolation, configuration, and failure behavior around a narrow extension surface.
Version persisted representations and migrate data without coupling domain objects directly to historical storage schemas.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
